title: AllianceCraft DSU
description: An unofficial modpack of client side mods for the Alliance at DSU's server.
body:
![Alliancecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09908e63a00bc75fa990f88da666e6343705eff9.png)

## ...Is a collection of client-side performance and gameplay enhancement mods!

This modpack was made with love for the folks playing on the Alliance club at DSU's Minecraft server! ❤️🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️

_Modlist Curated by Pythongirl & K0JIN_
